com.rscja.deviceapi

Class PSAM

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rscja.deviceapi.PSAM
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IPSAM

    public class PSAM
extends java.lang.Object
implements IPSAM
    PSAM操作API

    注意事项:
    1. App工程需要导入jna-5.4.0.jar 和 jna-platform-5.4.0.jar
    The App project needs to import jna-5.4.0.jar and jna-platform-5.4.0.jar
    windows系统注意事项:
    2. 需要依赖,UHFAPI.dll 和 hidapi.dll ，将这两个文件保存到程序根目录。也可以通过调用setDllOrSOFilePath函数来设置要加载的dll路径。
    2. Need to depend on, UHFAPI.dll and hidapi.dll, save these two files to the program root directory. You can also set the dll path to load by calling the setDllOrSOFilePath function.
    Linux系统注意事项:
    2.需要依赖 libTagReader.so ，将这个文件保存到命令行根目录。也可以通过调用setDllOrSOFilePath函数来设置要加载的so路径
    2. Need to depend on, libTagReader.so, save these two files to the program root directory. You can also set the so path to load by calling the setDllOrSOFilePath function.

    Example Usage:
    public void PSAMTest(){
      PSAM psam = PSAM.getInstance();
      psam.connect();
     
      byte card = card1:0 card2:1;
      if (!psam.init((byte)card)){
       //init fail
       return;
      }
      byte[] resetData=psam.reset(card);
      if (resetData == null){
       //reset fail
       return;
      }
      byte[] data= psam.transferCmd(card, cmdData);
      if (data == null){
       //failure
       return;
      }
      psam.free(card);
     
      psam.disconnect();
      }

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean connect()
      连接读写器(Connect to the reader)
      void disconnect()
      断开连接(disconnect)

      释放PSAM(Release PSAM)

      获取UHF操作实例

      重置PSAM卡(reset smart card )

      设置加载的dll文件路径
      byte[] transferCmd(byte cSlotNum, byte[] pcInCmd)

    • Method Detail

      • getInstance

        public static PSAM getInstance()
        获取UHF操作实例
        Acquire UHF operation Instance
        Returns:
        RFIDWithISO14443A

      • connect

        public boolean connect()
        连接读写器(Connect to the reader)
        Specified by:
        connect in interface IPSAM
        Returns:
        true:success false:fail

      • disconnect

        public void disconnect()
        断开连接(disconnect)
        Specified by:
        disconnect in interface IPSAM

      • init

        public boolean init(byte cSlotNum)
        始化PSAM(Initialize PSAM)
        Specified by:
        init in interface IPSAM
        Parameters:
        cSlotNum - psam卡槽0,1 (Card slot,value:0,1)
        Returns:
        true:success false:fail

      • free

        public boolean free(byte cSlotNum)
        释放PSAM(Release PSAM)
        Specified by:
        free in interface IPSAM
        Parameters:
        cSlotNum - psam卡槽0,1 (Card slot,value:0,1)
        Returns:
        true:success false:fail

      • reset

        public byte[] reset(byte cSlotNum)
        重置PSAM卡(reset smart card )
        Specified by:
        reset in interface IPSAM
        Returns:
        success will return HF14443RequestEntity data, failure will return null.

      • transferCmd

        public byte[] transferCmd(byte cSlotNum,
                          byte[] pcInCmd)
        传输psam命令(smart card transfer command)
        Specified by:
        transferCmd in interface IPSAM
        Returns:
        success will return HF14443RequestEntity data, failure will return null.

      • setDllOrSOFilePath

        public void setDllOrSOFilePath(java.lang.String directory,
                               java.lang.String fileName)
        设置加载的dll文件路径
        Parameters:
        directory - dll文件目录,如果文件目录为null，将采用可运行的jar文件执行路径
        fileName - dll文件名称，如果文件名为null，将使用默认文件名UHFAPI.dll 备注:如果需要使用此函数，请在调用init函数之前调用此函数。
